_meta.purpose: 48-configuration sweep over the COLA dial space, anchored to Highley's guidance: 'minimize max years between conference finals appearances'. See paper/sections/03-cola-family.tex Definition 2 for the seven-dial schema.

E.16-tiered: NBA 3-2-1 proposal pool: 10 non-playoff non-play-in + 4 record-9/10 + 2 7v8 losers

C.150: Capped COLA default per Highley Substack

requires_source_modification: S (carry-over scope; currently unbounded by ZenGM)
W (lottery weighting; currently L_i/P for top-4 + rank-order for rest)
zengm_mapping_notes.rationale: ZenGM ships one COLA configuration (matches Classic). Sweeping the dials requires patching src/worker/core/draft/cola.ts and src/common/constants.ts at each step. See DIAL_MAPPING.md.

_sensitivity_protocol.purpose: Verify the Pareto frontier is not an artefact of Monte Carlo noise. The shipped 2026-05-26 sensitivity re-ran a 9-config subset (the 5 Pareto-optimal configs + 4 dominated named variants) at each of {30, 100} replicates; an earlier draft of this note described a 4-config subset.
_sensitivity_protocol.seed_strategy: Fixed seed per (config_id, replicate_id). PRNG state captured in the run manifest for reproducibility.

_named_anchors.purpose: Off-grid named variants run alongside the 48 grid configs in the FULL-ENGINE validation sweep (frontier re-derived over all 50). These mechanisms differ on dials frozen in this grid (W / increment form / eligibility semantics), so they are implemented as bespoke driver configs, not grid points. Both use the same driver hook: compute the draft order driver-side, inject before ZenGM's draft phase.

countdown-cola.spec_source: Highley Substack, 'NBA Tanking Is Solvable: Four Candidates' (Part 3)
countdown-cola.mechanism: McCarty number (drought x wins); survivor-style elimination pools (5-team pools, 2-6 tickets); no team falls more than 4 spots

beckett-cola.spec_source: Highley & Sanderson Substack, 'Design Your Own Anti-Tanking NBA Draft: We Built Beckett COLA' (2026-04-10)
beckett-cola.mechanism: Eligibility drought >= 2 (drought = years since last #1 pick, top-6 seed, or playoff series win); entries = drought x wins (McCarty number); top-4 raffled by entries, rest in McCarty order; drought resets on top-6 seed / series win / #1 pick; lottery-day pick attribution
beckett-cola.open_spec_question: No stockpile cap mentioned in the post; implementing uncapped pending co-author confirmation

excluded_per_coauthor_2026-06-11.simple-lottery-cola: would mostly mirror Simple COLA results
excluded_per_coauthor_2026-06-11.mccarty-cola: not endorsed by co-author at this point
